documentId.value: ={{(() => { const raw = $('Webhook').item.json.body?.spreadsheetId || $('Webhook').item.json.body?.spreadsheetUrl || $('Webhook').item.json.body?.sheetUrl || ''; const match = String(raw).match(/\/spreadsheets\/d\/([a-zA-Z0-9-_]+)/); return match ? match[1] : raw; })()}}
